## Weekly groceries — ₹2,000 cap **1 person · 7 days · cost-first, basic nutrition** (grains, pulses, veg, eggs or dal-based protein). Prices are **estimated ranges** — search in app for live offers. Demo catalog currently shows mainly **atta (~₹89/kg)**; other staples depend

: You’ll get a cost-first basic setup for 1 person for 7 days, built around staples like atta, pulses, vegetables, and eggs or dal-based protein. The demo catalog is showing atta around ₹89 per kg as an example, but live prices will depend on actual offers in the app. I can also help refine the list once you share your preferences (vegetarian, non-veg, dietary restrictions, or favorite veggies).

Send
